subcodes.first_line: O seeing eye! The lights from the Kingdom of God shine manifest as the resplendent sun, and the Day-Star of the horizon of unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای چشم بینا انوار عیان از ملکوت یزدان چون مهر رخشان است و شمس افق توحید در
subcodes.subjects: @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @consolation and comfort, @transcending the material condition, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
